summary: Frontend-only UI testing of redesigned IMS Admin Portal landing page and sign-in page. All major sections verified visually and via element checks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign verified: dark navy hero (#0F172A), orange-red (#EA580C) CTAs and gradients, 'Professional' in orange gradient, stats ribbon with CountUp numbers, all sections (Accreditation, Integrated Learning, Featured Programs, Facilities, Events, Portal Access, Corporate Solutions, Footer) rendering correctly. Sign-in page: split layout with dark navy left panel, 'Empowering Excellence.' with orange gradient on 'Excellence.', AUTHENTICATION PORTAL in orange, form fields, Quick Access selector all present. Admin Login button correctly navigates to /sign-in.
